import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let trimmed = string.trim(s)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(n)
      mut i = n
      while i >= 0
        println("#{i}")
        i = i - 1
      end
      println("done")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
